patches.reason: Add local CLI support for sniffed Midjourney /api/submit-jobs imagine and rerun flows, including style references, omni references, and image prompts.
Add browser-backed image export because direct CDN fetches can be blocked by Cloudflare and browser fetch is CORS-limited.
Add style and Niji flags from model matrix captures and document the redacted endpoint findings.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... and dry-run payload inspection for --style cute --niji 6.
